_publications._publicationTitle: Clinician Perspectives of a Magnetic Resonance Imaging-Based 3D Volumetric Analysis Tool for Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Related Schwannomatosis: Qualitative Pilot Study.

_contextSnippet: In this study, surveys and clinical interviews were conducted to evaluate the efficacy of current 2D tumor analysis protocols and to assess the clinical interest, recommendations, and concerns regarding the incorporation of 3D volumetric analysis
details: Successfully used to conduct surveys evaluating clinician perspectives on 2D tumor analysis protocols and 3D volumetric analysis for NF2-related schwannomatosis treatment
